name: Adkins Energy LLC
summary: Adkins Energy LLC produces and supplies fuel-grade ethanol. Its products include DDGS-dried distillers grains with solubles are the chief byproduct of the ethanol production process; wet distillers grains are ethanol production process; ethanol is renewable fuel as a octane enhancer which reduces air pollution and improves automobile performance; corn oil, and corn. Adkins Energy LLC was formerly known as Adkins Energy Cooperative and changed its name to Adkins Energy LLC in September 2011. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Lena, Illinois.
